title: Brutalist Portfolio
seoTitle: Brutalist Portfolio - Downloadable Premium Portfolio Template | Multiverse
metaDescription: A bold brutalist portfolio with hard edges, strong contrast, and poster-like typography for a standout visual identity.
summary: A bold brutalist portfolio with hard edges, strong contrast, and poster-like typography for a standout visual identity.
description: This template is ideal for creatives who want an unapologetically bold personal website with heavy borders, raw shapes, and a more anti-polished, expressive portfolio direction.
audience: experimental designers, art directors, and bold personal brands
prompt: Design a premium brutalist portfolio with poster-like typography, hard-edged shapes, high contrast blocks, and a strong anti-polished identity.
layoutNotes: The brutalist identity should feel deliberate and graphic rather than messy.
This template works well for portfolios that want strong visual memorability over softness.
responsiveNotes: Hard-edged modules stack into strong mobile sections without losing visual clarity.
Typography remains large and direct so the style survives smaller screens.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>BRUTALIST — Portfolio</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Archivo+Black&family=Space+Mono:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400;1,700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        /* ============================================
           CSS CUSTOM PROPERTIES
           ============================================ */
        :root {
            --black: #000000;
            --white: #ffffff;
            --yellow: #FFE600;
            --red: #FF3B3B;
            --blue: #3B5EFF;
            --lime: #BFFF00;
            --orange: #FF8A00;
            --pink: #FF69B4;
            --cyan: #00FFFF;
            --gray: #E0E0E0;
            --dark-gray: #333333;

            --font-display: 'Archivo Black', sans-serif;
            --font-mono: 'Space Mono', monospace;

            --border-thick: 4px solid var(--black);
            --border-medium: 3px solid var(--black);
            --border-thin: 2px solid var(--black);

            --shadow-brutal: 6px 6px 0 var(--black);
            --shadow-brutal-sm: 4px 4px 0 var(--black);
            --shadow-brutal-lg: 8px 8px 0 var(--black);

            --rotation-1: -2deg;
            --rotation-2: 1.5deg;
            --rotation-3: -1deg;
            --rotation-4: 3deg;
        }

        /* ============================================
           RESET & BASE
           ============================================ */
        *, *::before, *::after {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        html {
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        body {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            background-color: var(--white);
            color: var(--black);
            line-height: 1.6;
            cursor: crosshair;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        ::selection {
            background: var(--yellow);
            color: var(--black);
        }

        a {
            color: inherit;
            text-decoration: none;
        }

        img {
            display: block;
            max-width: 100%;
        }

        /* ============================================
           UTILITY CLASSES
           ============================================ */
        .container {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 24px;
        }

        .rotate-1 { transform: rotate(var(--rotation-1)); }
        .rotate-2 { transform: rotate(var(--rotation-2)); }
        .rotate-3 { transform: rotate(var(--rotation-3)); }
        .rotate-4 { transform: rotate(var(--rotation-4)); }

        .sticker {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 6px 16px;
            border: var(--border-thick);
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-sm);
            position: relative;
        }

        .sticker::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -2px;
            left: -2px;
            right: -2px;
            bottom: -2px;
            border: 2px dashed rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .sticker-yellow { background: var(--yellow); }
        .sticker-red { background: var(--red); color: var(--white); }
        .sticker-blue { background: var(--blue); color: var(--white); }
        .sticker-lime { background: var(--lime); }
        .sticker-orange { background: var(--orange); }
        .sticker-pink { background: var(--pink); }
        .sticker-cyan { background: var(--cyan); }

        .section-divider {
            width: 100%;
            height: 4px;
            background: repeating-linear-gradient(
                90deg,
                var(--black) 0px,
                var(--black) 20px,
                var(--yellow) 20px,
                var(--yellow) 40px,
                var(--red) 40px,
                var(--red) 60px,
                var(--blue) 60px,
                var(--blue) 80px
            );
        }

        .section-label {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.2rem);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            padding: 4px 12px;
            border: var(--border-medium);
            background: var(--black);
            color: var(--white);
            display: inline-block;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
        }

        /* ============================================
           NAVIGATION
           ============================================ */
        .nav {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            z-index: 1000;
            background: var(--yellow);
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
        }

        .nav__inner {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 12px 24px;
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .nav__logo {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            border: var(--border-thick);
            padding: 4px 12px;
            background: var(--white);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-sm);
        }

        .nav__links {
            display: flex;
            gap: 4px;
            list-style: none;
        }

        .nav__links a {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            padding: 8px 14px;
            border: var(--border-medium);
            background: var(--white);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-sm);
            transition: transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
            display: block;
        }

        .nav__links a:hover {
            transform: translate(-2px, -2px);
            box-shadow: 8px 8px 0 var(--black);
            background: var(--lime);
        }

        .nav__toggle {
            display: none;
            background: var(--white);
            border: var(--border-thick);
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            padding: 4px 12px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-sm);
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .nav__links {
                display: none;
                position: absolute;
                top: 100%;
                left: 0;
                right: 0;
                background: var(--yellow);
                border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
                flex-direction: column;
                padding: 8px;
                gap: 6px;
            }

            .nav__links.active {
                display: flex;
            }

            .nav__toggle {
                display: block;
            }
        }

        /* ============================================
           HERO SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .hero {
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            grid-template-rows: auto 1fr auto;
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
            padding-top: 70px;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .hero__tag {
            grid-column: 1 / -1;
            padding: 12px 24px;
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.2em;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .hero__tag-dot {
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            background: var(--red);
            border: var(--border-thin);
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: blink 1s infinite;
        }

        @keyframes blink {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
            50% { opacity: 0; }
        }

        .hero__left {
            padding: 60px 40px;
            border-right: var(--border-thick);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
        }

        .hero__greeting {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-size: 1rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            padding: 4px 10px;
            background: var(--lime);
            border: var(--border-medium);
            display: inline-block;
            align-self: flex-start;
        }

        .hero__name {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 7rem);
            line-height: 0.95;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
            letter-spacing: -0.03em;
        }

        .hero__name span {
            display: block;
            color: var(--blue);
            -webkit-text-stroke: 2px var(--black);
        }

        .hero__title {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 4vw, 3rem);
            line-height: 1.1;
            background: var(--yellow);
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border: var(--border-thick);
            display: inline-block;
            transform: rotate(var(--rotation-2));
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal);
            margin-bottom: 24px;
        }

        .hero__desc {
            font-size: 1rem;
            max-width: 500px;
            margin-bottom: 32px;
            line-height: 1.7;
        }

        .hero__cta {
            display: flex;
            gap: 12px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }

        .btn-brutal {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            padding: 14px 28px;
            border: var(--border-thick);
            cursor: pointer;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal);
            transition: transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
        }

        .btn-brutal:hover {
            transform: translate(-3px, -3px);
            box-shadow: 9px 9px 0 var(--black);
        }

        .btn-brutal:active {
            transform: translate(3px, 3px);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 var(--black);
        }

        .btn-primary { background: var(--red); color: var(--white); }
        .btn-secondary { background: var(--white); }

        .hero__right {
            padding: 40px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
            background:
                repeating-linear-gradient(
                    45deg,
                    transparent,
                    transparent 20px,
                    rgba(0,0,0,0.03) 20px,
                    rgba(0,0,0,0.03) 40px
                );
        }

        .hero__image-frame {
            width: 80%;
            max-width: 400px;
            aspect-ratio: 3/4;
            border: var(--border-thick);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-lg);
            background: var(--gray);
            transform: rotate(var(--rotation-3));
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .hero__image-frame::after {
            content: 'YOUR\nPHOTO\nHERE';
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 2rem;
            text-align: center;
            line-height: 1.3;
            color: var(--dark-gray);
            white-space: pre-line;
        }

        .hero__image-badge {
            position: absolute;
            top: -20px;
            right: -20px;
            width: 90px;
            height: 90px;
            background: var(--orange);
            border: var(--border-thick);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            text-align: center;
            transform: rotate(15deg);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-sm);
            line-height: 1.2;
        }

        .hero__bottom {
            grid-column: 1 / -1;
            border-top: var(--border-thick);
            padding: 16px 24px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .hero__stat {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
        }

        .hero__stat strong {
            font-size: 1.4rem;
            font-family: var(--font-display);
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .hero {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            .hero__left {
                border-right: none;
                border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
                padding: 40px 24px;
            }
            .hero__right {
                padding: 40px 24px;
            }
            .hero__image-frame {
                width: 60%;
            }
        }

        /* ============================================
           MARQUEE
           ============================================ */
        .marquee {
            overflow: hidden;
            border-top: var(--border-thick);
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
            background: var(--black);
            color: var(--white);
            padding: 14px 0;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        .marquee__track {
            display: inline-flex;
            animation: marquee-scroll 20s linear infinite;
        }

        .marquee__item {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 3vw, 2rem);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            padding: 0 24px;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 16px;
        }

        .marquee__item .sep {
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            background: var(--yellow);
            border-radius: 0;
            transform: rotate(45deg);
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        @keyframes marquee-scroll {
            0% { transform: translateX(0); }
            100% { transform: translateX(-50%); }
        }

        /* ============================================
           PROJECTS SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .projects {
            padding: 80px 0;
        }

        .projects__header {
            padding: 0 24px;
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto 48px;
        }

        .projects__grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(380px, 1fr));
            gap: 0;
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            border: var(--border-thick);
        }

        .project-card {
            border: var(--border-thick);
            margin: -4px;
            background: var(--white);
            padding: 0;
            transition: transform 0.2s, z-index 0s;
            position: relative;
        }

        .project-card:hover {
            z-index: 10;
            transform: scale(1.03) rotate(var(--rotation-2));
        }

        .project-card:nth-child(even):hover {
            transform: scale(1.03) rotate(var(--rotation-1));
        }

        .project-card__image {
            width: 100%;
            aspect-ratio: 16/10;
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
            background: var(--gray);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            color: var(--dark-gray);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .project-card__image::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: repeating-linear-gradient(
                -45deg,
                transparent,
                transparent 10px,
                rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 10px,
                rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 20px
            );
        }

        .project-card__image--yellow { background: var(--yellow); }
        .project-card__image--red { background: var(--red); color: var(--white); }
        .project-card__image--blue { background: var(--blue); color: var(--white); }
        .project-card__image--lime { background: var(--lime); }

        .project-card__number {
            position: absolute;
            top: 12px;
            left: 12px;
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 3rem;
            line-height: 1;
            opacity: 0.15;
        }

        .project-card__body {
            padding: 20px;
        }

        .project-card__tags {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 6px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }

        .project-card__tag {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            padding: 3px 8px;
            border: var(--border-thin);
            background: var(--white);
        }

        .project-card__title {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            line-height: 1.1;
        }

        .project-card__desc {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }

        .project-card__link {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border: var(--border-medium);
            background: var(--black);
            color: var(--white);
            display: inline-block;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-sm);
            transition: transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
        }

        .project-card__link:hover {
            transform: translate(-2px, -2px);
            box-shadow: 6px 6px 0 var(--black);
            background: var(--blue);
        }

        @media (max-width: 480px) {
            .projects__grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
        }

        /* ============================================
           SKILLS SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .skills {
            padding: 80px 0;
            background: var(--dark-gray);
            color: var(--white);
            border-top: var(--border-thick);
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
        }

        .skills__header {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto 48px;
            padding: 0 24px;
        }

        .skills .section-label {
            background: var(--yellow);
            color: var(--black);
        }

        .skills__wall {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 24px;
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 12px;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .skill-sticker {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            padding: 10px 20px;
            border: var(--border-thick);
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-sm);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s;
            position: relative;
        }

        .skill-sticker:hover {
            transform: rotate(var(--rotation-4)) scale(1.08);
            z-index: 5;
        }

        .skill-sticker__icon {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
        }

        /* ============================================
           ABOUT SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .about {
            padding: 80px 0;
        }

        .about__grid {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 24px;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            border: var(--border-thick);
        }

        .about__photo {
            border-right: var(--border-thick);
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
            padding: 0;
            background: var(--yellow);
            aspect-ratio: 1;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .about__photo-placeholder {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(4rem, 10vw, 10rem);
            line-height: 1;
            opacity: 0.1;
        }

        .about__photo-badge {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 20px;
            right: 20px;
        }

        .about__content {
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
            padding: 40px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .about__content h3 {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            line-height: 1.05;
        }

        .about__content h3 span {
            background: var(--lime);
            padding: 0 8px;
            border: var(--border-medium);
            display: inline-block;
            transform: rotate(var(--rotation-2));
        }

        .about__content p {
            font-size: 1rem;
            line-height: 1.8;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }

        .about__stats {
            grid-column: 1 / -1;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
        }

        .about__stat {
            padding: 24px;
            border-right: var(--border-thick);
            text-align: center;
        }

        .about__stat:last-child {
            border-right: none;
        }

        .about__stat-number {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem);
            line-height: 1;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }

        .about__stat-label {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .about__grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            .about__photo {
                border-right: none;
                aspect-ratio: 16/9;
            }
            .about__stats {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            }
            .about__stat:nth-child(2) {
                border-right: none;
            }
            .about__stat:nth-child(1),
            .about__stat:nth-child(2) {
                border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
            }
        }

        /* ============================================
           EXPERIENCE SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .experience {
            padding: 80px 0;
            background: var(--gray);
        }

        .experience__header {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto 48px;
            padding: 0 24px;
        }

        .experience__table {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 24px;
            border: var(--border-thick);
            background: var(--white);
        }

        .experience__row {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 120px 2fr 1fr 1fr;
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
            transition: background 0.15s;
        }

        .experience__row:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }

        .experience__row:hover {
            background: var(--yellow);
        }

        .experience__row-header {
            background: var(--black);
            color: var(--white);
        }

        .experience__row-header:hover {
            background: var(--black);
        }

        .experience__cell {
            padding: 16px 20px;
            border-right: var(--border-thin);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
        }

        .experience__cell:last-child {
            border-right: none;
        }

        .experience__row-header .experience__cell {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
        }

        .experience__year {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
        }

        .experience__role {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }

        .experience__company {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            color: var(--dark-gray);
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .experience__row {
                grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr;
            }
            .experience__cell:nth-child(3),
            .experience__cell:nth-child(4) {
                display: none;
            }
            .experience__row-header .experience__cell:nth-child(3),
            .experience__row-header .experience__cell:nth-child(4) {
                display: none;
            }
        }

        /* ============================================
           TESTIMONIALS SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .testimonials {
            padding: 80px 0;
        }

        .testimonials__header {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto 48px;
            padding: 0 24px;
        }

        .testimonials__grid {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 24px;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(380px, 1fr));
            gap: 32px;
        }

        .testimonial {
            border: var(--border-thick);
            padding: 32px;
            background: var(--white);
            position: relative;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal);
        }

        .testimonial:nth-child(1) {
            transform: rotate(var(--rotation-3));
            background: var(--yellow);
        }

        .testimonial:nth-child(2) {
            transform: rotate(var(--rotation-2));
            background: var(--lime);
        }

        .testimonial:nth-child(3) {
            transform: rotate(var(--rotation-1));
            background: var(--cyan);
        }

        .testimonial:hover {
            transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1.03);
            z-index: 5;
        }

        .testimonial__quote-mark {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 5rem;
            line-height: 1;
            position: absolute;
            top: 8px;
            left: 16px;
            opacity: 0.15;
        }

        .testimonial__text {
            font-size: 1rem;
            line-height: 1.7;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .testimonial__author {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            border-top: var(--border-thin);
            padding-top: 16px;
        }

        .testimonial__avatar {
            width: 48px;
            height: 48px;
            border: var(--border-medium);
            background: var(--white);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .testimonial__name {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1rem;
        }

        .testimonial__role {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
        }

        @media (max-width: 480px) {
            .testimonials__grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
        }

        /* ============================================
           CONTACT SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .contact {
            padding: 80px 0;
            background: var(--blue);
            color: var(--white);
            border-top: var(--border-thick);
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
        }

        .contact .section-label {
            background: var(--yellow);
            color: var(--black);
        }

        .contact__layout {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 24px;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 0;
            border: var(--border-thick);
            background: var(--white);
            color: var(--black);
        }

        .contact__info {
            padding: 48px;
            border-right: var(--border-thick);
            background: var(--yellow);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }

        .contact__info h3 {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
            line-height: 1.05;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        .contact__info p {
            font-size: 1rem;
            line-height: 1.7;
            margin-bottom: 32px;
        }

        .contact__details {
            list-style: none;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 16px;
        }

        .contact__details li {
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border: var(--border-medium);
            background: var(--white);
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-sm);
        }

        .contact__form-area {
            padding: 48px;
        }

        .form-brutal {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 16px;
        }

        .form-brutal__group {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 6px;
        }

        .form-brutal__label {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
        }

        .form-brutal__input,
        .form-brutal__textarea {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border: var(--border-thick);
            background: var(--gray);
            outline: none;
            transition: background 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
            width: 100%;
        }

        .form-brutal__input:focus,
        .form-brutal__textarea:focus {
            background: var(--lime);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-sm);
        }

        .form-brutal__textarea {
            min-height: 120px;
            resize: vertical;
        }

        .form-brutal__submit {
            align-self: flex-start;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .contact__layout {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            .contact__info {
                border-right: none;
                border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
            }
        }

        /* ============================================
           FOOTER
           ============================================ */
        .footer {
            background: var(--black);
            color: var(--white);
            border-top: var(--border-thick);
        }

        .footer__top {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 48px 24px;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 40px;
            border-bottom: var(--border-thin);
        }

        .footer__brand-name {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 2rem;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }

        .footer__brand-desc {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            line-height: 1.7;
            max-width: 320px;
            color: var(--gray);
        }

        .footer__col-title {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.2em;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            padding-bottom: 8px;
            border-bottom: var(--border-thin);
        }

        .footer__col-links {
            list-style: none;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .footer__col-links a {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            color: var(--gray);
            transition: color 0.15s;
        }

        .footer__col-links a:hover {
            color: var(--yellow);
        }

        .footer__bottom {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 20px 24px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .footer__copy {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--dark-gray);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
        }

        .footer__socials {
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .footer__social {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border: var(--border-medium);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s;
            background: transparent;
            color: var(--white);
        }

        .footer__social:hover {
            background: var(--yellow);
            color: var(--black);
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .footer__top {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 480px) {
            .footer__top {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
        }

        /* ============================================
           ANIMATIONS
           ============================================ */
        @keyframes shake {
            0%, 100% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
            25% { transform: rotate(-1deg); }
            75% { transform: rotate(1deg); }
        }

        .animate-shake:hover {
            animation: shake 0.3s ease-in-out;
        }

        /* ============================================
           SCROLL ANIMATIONS
           ============================================ */
        .reveal {
            opacity: 0;
            transform: translateY(30px);
            transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease;
        }

        .reveal.visible {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: translateY(0);
        }
    </style>
</head>

    <script>
        // =============================================
        // Mobile Navigation Toggle
        // =============================================
        const navToggle = document.querySelector('.nav__toggle');
        const navLinks = document.querySelector('.nav__links');

        navToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
            navLinks.classList.toggle('active');
        });

        // Close nav when a link is clicked (mobile)
        navLinks.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(link => {
            link.addEventListener('click', () => {
                navLinks.classList.remove('active');
            });
        });

        // =============================================
        // Scroll Reveal Animation
        // =============================================
        const revealElements = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');

        const revealObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
            entries.forEach(entry => {
                if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                    entry.target.classList.add('visible');
                }
            });
        }, {
            threshold: 0.1,
            rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px'
        });

        revealElements.forEach(el => revealObserver.observe(el));

        // =============================================
        // Sticker Random Rotation on Load
        // =============================================
        document.querySelectorAll('.skill-sticker').forEach(sticker => {
            const randomRotation = (Math.random() * 6 - 3).toFixed(2);
            sticker.style.transform = `rotate(${randomRotation}deg)`;
            sticker.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                const hoverRotation = (Math.random() * 10 - 5).toFixed(2);
                sticker.style.transform = `rotate(${hoverRotation}deg) scale(1.1)`;
            });
            sticker.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                sticker.style.transform = `rotate(${randomRotation}deg)`;
            });
        });

        // =============================================
        // Project Card Hover Sound-like Effect (Visual)
        // =============================================
        document.querySelectorAll('.project-card').forEach(card => {
            card.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                card.style.zIndex = '10';
            });
            card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                card.style.zIndex = '1';
            });
        });

        // =============================================
        // Nav Background on Scroll
        // =============================================
        const nav = document.querySelector('.nav');
        let lastScroll = 0;

        window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
            const currentScroll = window.pageYOffset;
            if (currentScroll > 100) {
                nav.style.boxShadow = '0 4px 0 var(--black)';
            } else {
                nav.style.boxShadow = 'none';
            }
            lastScroll = currentScroll;
        });

        // =============================================
        // Form Submission Handler
        // =============================================
        function handleSubmit(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            const form = e.target;
            const submitBtn = form.querySelector('.form-brutal__submit');
            const originalText = submitBtn.textContent;

            submitBtn.textContent = 'SENT! ✓';
            submitBtn.style.background = 'var(--lime)';
            submitBtn.style.color = 'var(--black)';

            setTimeout(() => {
                submitBtn.textContent = originalText;
                submitBtn.style.background = '';
                submitBtn.style.color = '';
                form.reset();
            }, 2500);
        }

        // =============================================
        // Experience Row Hover Accent
        // =============================================
        document.querySelectorAll('.experience__row:not(.experience__row-header)').forEach(row => {
            row.style.cursor = 'pointer';
            row.addEventListener('click', () => {
                // Quick flash animation
                row.style.background = 'var(--lime)';
                setTimeout(() => {
                    row.style.background = '';
                }, 300);
            });
        });

        // =============================================
        // Console Easter Egg
        // =============================================
        console.log('%c BRUTALIST PORTFOLIO ', 'background: #FFE600; color: #000; font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; padding: 10px 20px; border: 4px solid #000;');
        console.log('%c Designed with raw energy and zero compromises. ', 'background: #000; color: #FFE600; font-size: 14px; padding: 8px 16px;');
    </script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>BRUTALIST — Portfolio</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Archivo+Black&family=Space+Mono:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400;1,700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        /* ============================================
           CSS CUSTOM PROPERTIES
           ============================================ */
        :root {
            --black: #000000;
            --white: #ffffff;
            --yellow: #FFE600;
            --red: #FF3B3B;
            --blue: #3B5EFF;
            --lime: #BFFF00;
            --orange: #FF8A00;
            --pink: #FF69B4;
            --cyan: #00FFFF;
            --gray: #E0E0E0;
            --dark-gray: #333333;

            --font-display: 'Archivo Black', sans-serif;
            --font-mono: 'Space Mono', monospace;

            --border-thick: 4px solid var(--black);
            --border-medium: 3px solid var(--black);
            --border-thin: 2px solid var(--black);

            --shadow-brutal: 6px 6px 0 var(--black);
            --shadow-brutal-sm: 4px 4px 0 var(--black);
            --shadow-brutal-lg: 8px 8px 0 var(--black);

            --rotation-1: -2deg;
            --rotation-2: 1.5deg;
            --rotation-3: -1deg;
            --rotation-4: 3deg;
        }

        /* ============================================
           RESET & BASE
           ============================================ */
        *, *::before, *::after {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        html {
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        body {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            background-color: var(--white);
            color: var(--black);
            line-height: 1.6;
            cursor: crosshair;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        ::selection {
            background: var(--yellow);
            color: var(--black);
        }

        a {
            color: inherit;
            text-decoration: none;
        }

        img {
            display: block;
            max-width: 100%;
        }

        /* ============================================
           UTILITY CLASSES
           ============================================ */
        .container {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 24px;
        }

        .rotate-1 { transform: rotate(var(--rotation-1)); }
        .rotate-2 { transform: rotate(var(--rotation-2)); }
        .rotate-3 { transform: rotate(var(--rotation-3)); }
        .rotate-4 { transform: rotate(var(--rotation-4)); }

        .sticker {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 6px 16px;
            border: var(--border-thick);
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-sm);
            position: relative;
        }

        .sticker::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -2px;
            left: -2px;
            right: -2px;
            bottom: -2px;
            border: 2px dashed rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .sticker-yellow { background: var(--yellow); }
        .sticker-red { background: var(--red); color: var(--white); }
        .sticker-blue { background: var(--blue); color: var(--white); }
        .sticker-lime { background: var(--lime); }
        .sticker-orange { background: var(--orange); }
        .sticker-pink { background: var(--pink); }
        .sticker-cyan { background: var(--cyan); }

        .section-divider {
            width: 100%;
            height: 4px;
            background: repeating-linear-gradient(
                90deg,
                var(--black) 0px,
                var(--black) 20px,
                var(--yellow) 20px,
                var(--yellow) 40px,
                var(--red) 40px,
                var(--red) 60px,
                var(--blue) 60px,
                var(--blue) 80px
            );
        }

        .section-label {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.2rem);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            padding: 4px 12px;
            border: var(--border-medium);
            background: var(--black);
            color: var(--white);
            display: inline-block;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
        }

        /* ============================================
           NAVIGATION
           ============================================ */
        .nav {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            z-index: 1000;
            background: var(--yellow);
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
        }

        .nav__inner {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 12px 24px;
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }

        .nav__logo {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            border: var(--border-thick);
            padding: 4px 12px;
            background: var(--white);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-sm);
        }

        .nav__links {
            display: flex;
            gap: 4px;
            list-style: none;
        }

        .nav__links a {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            padding: 8px 14px;
            border: var(--border-medium);
            background: var(--white);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-sm);
            transition: transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
            display: block;
        }

        .nav__links a:hover {
            transform: translate(-2px, -2px);
            box-shadow: 8px 8px 0 var(--black);
            background: var(--lime);
        }

        .nav__toggle {
            display: none;
            background: var(--white);
            border: var(--border-thick);
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            padding: 4px 12px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-sm);
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .nav__links {
                display: none;
                position: absolute;
                top: 100%;
                left: 0;
                right: 0;
                background: var(--yellow);
                border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
                flex-direction: column;
                padding: 8px;
                gap: 6px;
            }

            .nav__links.active {
                display: flex;
            }

            .nav__toggle {
                display: block;
            }
        }

        /* ============================================
           HERO SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .hero {
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            grid-template-rows: auto 1fr auto;
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
            padding-top: 70px;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .hero__tag {
            grid-column: 1 / -1;
            padding: 12px 24px;
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.2em;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .hero__tag-dot {
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            background: var(--red);
            border: var(--border-thin);
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: blink 1s infinite;
        }

        @keyframes blink {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
            50% { opacity: 0; }
        }

        .hero__left {
            padding: 60px 40px;
            border-right: var(--border-thick);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
        }

        .hero__greeting {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-size: 1rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            padding: 4px 10px;
            background: var(--lime);
            border: var(--border-medium);
            display: inline-block;
            align-self: flex-start;
        }

        .hero__name {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 7rem);
            line-height: 0.95;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
            letter-spacing: -0.03em;
        }

        .hero__name span {
            display: block;
            color: var(--blue);
            -webkit-text-stroke: 2px var(--black);
        }

        .hero__title {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 4vw, 3rem);
            line-height: 1.1;
            background: var(--yellow);
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border: var(--border-thick);
            display: inline-block;
            transform: rotate(var(--rotation-2));
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal);
            margin-bottom: 24px;
        }

        .hero__desc {
            font-size: 1rem;
            max-width: 500px;
            margin-bottom: 32px;
            line-height: 1.7;
        }

        .hero__cta {
            display: flex;
            gap: 12px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }

        .btn-brutal {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            padding: 14px 28px;
            border: var(--border-thick);
            cursor: pointer;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal);
            transition: transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
        }

        .btn-brutal:hover {
            transform: translate(-3px, -3px);
            box-shadow: 9px 9px 0 var(--black);
        }

        .btn-brutal:active {
            transform: translate(3px, 3px);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 var(--black);
        }

        .btn-primary { background: var(--red); color: var(--white); }
        .btn-secondary { background: var(--white); }

        .hero__right {
            padding: 40px;

            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
            background:
                repeating-linear-gradient(
                    45deg,

                    rgba(0,0,0,0.03) 40px

        .hero__image-frame {

            aspect-ratio: 3/4;

        .hero__image-frame::after {

            justify-content: center;
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            text-align: center;
            transform: rotate(15deg);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-sm);
            line-height: 1.2;
        }

        .hero__bottom {
            grid-column: 1 / -1;
            border-top: var(--border-thick);
            padding: 16px 24px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .hero__stat {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
        }

        .hero__stat strong {
            font-size: 1.4rem;
            font-family: var(--font-display);
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .hero {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            .hero__left {
                border-right: none;
                border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
                padding: 40px 24px;
            }
            .hero__right {
                padding: 40px 24px;
            }
            .hero__image-frame {
                width: 60%;
            }
        }

        /* ============================================
           MARQUEE
           ============================================ */
        .marquee {
            overflow: hidden;
            border-top: var(--border-thick);
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
            background: var(--black);
            color: var(--white);
            padding: 14px 0;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }

        .marquee__track {
            display: inline-flex;
            animation: marquee-scroll 20s linear infinite;
        }

        .marquee__item {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 3vw, 2rem);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            padding: 0 24px;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 16px;
        }

        .marquee__item .sep {
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            background: var(--yellow);
            border-radius: 0;
            transform: rotate(45deg);
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        @keyframes marquee-scroll {
            0% { transform: translateX(0); }
            100% { transform: translateX(-50%); }
        }

        /* ============================================
           PROJECTS SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .projects {
            padding: 80px 0;
        }

        .projects__header {
            padding: 0 24px;
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto 48px;
        }

        .projects__grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(380px, 1fr));
            gap: 0;
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            border: var(--border-thick);
        }

        .project-card {
            border: var(--border-thick);
            margin: -4px;
            background: var(--white);
            padding: 0;
            transition: transform 0.2s, z-index 0s;
            position: relative;
        }

        .project-card:hover {
            z-index: 10;
            transform: scale(1.03) rotate(var(--rotation-2));
        }

        .project-card:nth-child(even):hover {
            transform: scale(1.03) rotate(var(--rotation-1));
        }

        .project-card__image {
            width: 100%;
            aspect-ratio: 16/10;
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
            background: var(--gray);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            color: var(--dark-gray);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .project-card__image::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: repeating-linear-gradient(
                -45deg,
                transparent,
                transparent 10px,
                rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 10px,
                rgba(0,0,0,0.04) 20px
            );
        }

        .project-card__image--yellow { background: var(--yellow); }
        .project-card__image--red { background: var(--red); color: var(--white); }
        .project-card__image--blue { background: var(--blue); color: var(--white); }
        .project-card__image--lime { background: var(--lime); }

        .project-card__number {
            position: absolute;
            top: 12px;
            left: 12px;
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 3rem;
            line-height: 1;
            opacity: 0.15;
        }

        .project-card__body {
            padding: 20px;
        }

        .project-card__tags {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 6px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }

        .project-card__tag {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            padding: 3px 8px;
            border: var(--border-thin);
            background: var(--white);
        }

        .project-card__title {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            line-height: 1.1;
        }

        .project-card__desc {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }

        .project-card__link {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border: var(--border-medium);
            background: var(--black);
            color: var(--white);
            display: inline-block;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-sm);
            transition: transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
        }

        .project-card__link:hover {
            transform: translate(-2px, -2px);
            box-shadow: 6px 6px 0 var(--black);
            background: var(--blue);
        }

        @media (max-width: 480px) {
            .projects__grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
        }

        /* ============================================
           SKILLS SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .skills {
            padding: 80px 0;
            background: var(--dark-gray);
            color: var(--white);
            border-top: var(--border-thick);
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
        }

        .skills__header {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto 48px;
            padding: 0 24px;
        }

        .skills .section-label {
            background: var(--yellow);
            color: var(--black);
        }

        .skills__wall {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 24px;
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 12px;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .skill-sticker {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            padding: 10px 20px;
            border: var(--border-thick);
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-sm);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.2s;
            position: relative;
        }

        .skill-sticker:hover {
            transform: rotate(var(--rotation-4)) scale(1.08);
            z-index: 5;
        }

        .skill-sticker__icon {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
        }

        /* ============================================
           ABOUT SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .about {
            padding: 80px 0;
        }

        .about__grid {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 24px;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            border: var(--border-thick);
        }

        .about__photo {
            border-right: var(--border-thick);
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
            padding: 0;
            background: var(--yellow);
            aspect-ratio: 1;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .about__photo-placeholder {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(4rem, 10vw, 10rem);
            line-height: 1;
            opacity: 0.1;
        }

        .about__photo-badge {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 20px;
            right: 20px;
        }

        .about__content {
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
            padding: 40px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .about__content h3 {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            line-height: 1.05;
        }

        .about__content h3 span {
            background: var(--lime);
            padding: 0 8px;
            border: var(--border-medium);
            display: inline-block;
            transform: rotate(var(--rotation-2));
        }

        .about__content p {
            font-size: 1rem;
            line-height: 1.8;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }

        .about__stats {
            grid-column: 1 / -1;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
        }

        .about__stat {
            padding: 24px;
            border-right: var(--border-thick);
            text-align: center;
        }

        .about__stat:last-child {
            border-right: none;
        }

        .about__stat-number {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem);
            line-height: 1;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }

        .about__stat-label {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .about__grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            .about__photo {
                border-right: none;
                aspect-ratio: 16/9;
            }
            .about__stats {
                grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            }
            .about__stat:nth-child(2) {
                border-right: none;
            }
            .about__stat:nth-child(1),
            .about__stat:nth-child(2) {
                border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
            }
        }

        /* ============================================
           EXPERIENCE SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .experience {
            padding: 80px 0;
            background: var(--gray);
        }

        .experience__header {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto 48px;
            padding: 0 24px;
        }

        .experience__table {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 24px;
            border: var(--border-thick);
            background: var(--white);
        }

        .experience__row {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 120px 2fr 1fr 1fr;
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
            transition: background 0.15s;
        }

        .experience__row:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }

        .experience__row:hover {
            background: var(--yellow);
        }

        .experience__row-header {
            background: var(--black);
            color: var(--white);
        }

        .experience__row-header:hover {
            background: var(--black);
        }

        .experience__cell {
            padding: 16px 20px;
            border-right: var(--border-thin);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
        }

        .experience__cell:last-child {
            border-right: none;
        }

        .experience__row-header .experience__cell {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
        }

        .experience__year {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
        }

        .experience__role {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }

        .experience__company {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            color: var(--dark-gray);
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .experience__row {
                grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr;
            }
            .experience__cell:nth-child(3),
            .experience__cell:nth-child(4) {
                display: none;
            }
            .experience__row-header .experience__cell:nth-child(3),
            .experience__row-header .experience__cell:nth-child(4) {
                display: none;
            }
        }

        /* ============================================
           TESTIMONIALS SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .testimonials {
            padding: 80px 0;
        }

        .testimonials__header {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto 48px;
            padding: 0 24px;
        }

        .testimonials__grid {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 24px;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(380px, 1fr));
            gap: 32px;
        }

        .testimonial {
            border: var(--border-thick);
            padding: 32px;
            background: var(--white);
            position: relative;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal);
        }

        .testimonial:nth-child(1) {
            transform: rotate(var(--rotation-3));
            background: var(--yellow);
        }

        .testimonial:nth-child(2) {
            transform: rotate(var(--rotation-2));
            background: var(--lime);
        }

        .testimonial:nth-child(3) {
            transform: rotate(var(--rotation-1));
            background: var(--cyan);
        }

        .testimonial:hover {
            transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1.03);
            z-index: 5;
        }

        .testimonial__quote-mark {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 5rem;
            line-height: 1;
            position: absolute;
            top: 8px;
            left: 16px;
            opacity: 0.15;
        }

        .testimonial__text {
            font-size: 1rem;
            line-height: 1.7;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .testimonial__author {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            border-top: var(--border-thin);
            padding-top: 16px;
        }

        .testimonial__avatar {
            width: 48px;
            height: 48px;
            border: var(--border-medium);
            background: var(--white);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .testimonial__name {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 1rem;
        }

        .testimonial__role {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
        }

        @media (max-width: 480px) {
            .testimonials__grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
        }

        /* ============================================
           CONTACT SECTION
           ============================================ */
        .contact {
            padding: 80px 0;
            background: var(--blue);
            color: var(--white);
            border-top: var(--border-thick);
            border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
        }

        .contact .section-label {
            background: var(--yellow);
            color: var(--black);
        }

        .contact__layout {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 24px;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 0;
            border: var(--border-thick);
            background: var(--white);
            color: var(--black);
        }

        .contact__info {
            padding: 48px;
            border-right: var(--border-thick);
            background: var(--yellow);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }

        .contact__info h3 {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
            line-height: 1.05;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        .contact__info p {
            font-size: 1rem;
            line-height: 1.7;
            margin-bottom: 32px;
        }

        .contact__details {
            list-style: none;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 16px;
        }

        .contact__details li {
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border: var(--border-medium);
            background: var(--white);
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-sm);
        }

        .contact__form-area {
            padding: 48px;
        }

        .form-brutal {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 16px;
        }

        .form-brutal__group {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 6px;
        }

        .form-brutal__label {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
        }

        .form-brutal__input,
        .form-brutal__textarea {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border: var(--border-thick);
            background: var(--gray);
            outline: none;
            transition: background 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
            width: 100%;
        }

        .form-brutal__input:focus,
        .form-brutal__textarea:focus {
            background: var(--lime);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-brutal-sm);
        }

        .form-brutal__textarea {
            min-height: 120px;
            resize: vertical;
        }

        .form-brutal__submit {
            align-self: flex-start;
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .contact__layout {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            .contact__info {
                border-right: none;
                border-bottom: var(--border-thick);
            }
        }

        /* ============================================
           FOOTER
           ============================================ */
        .footer {
            background: var(--black);
            color: var(--white);
            border-top: var(--border-thick);
        }

        .footer__top {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 48px 24px;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 40px;
            border-bottom: var(--border-thin);
        }

        .footer__brand-name {
            font-family: var(--font-display);
            font-size: 2rem;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }

        .footer__brand-desc {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            line-height: 1.7;
            max-width: 320px;
            color: var(--gray);
        }

        .footer__col-title {
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.2em;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            padding-bottom: 8px;
            border-bottom: var(--border-thin);
        }

        .footer__col-links {
            list-style: none;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .footer__col-links a {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            color: var(--gray);
            transition: color 0.15s;
        }

        .footer__col-links a:hover {
            color: var(--yellow);
        }

        .footer__bottom {
            max-width: 1400px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 20px 24px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .footer__copy {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--dark-gray);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
        }

        .footer__socials {
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .footer__social {
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            border: var(--border-medium);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-family: var(--font-mono);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s;
            background: transparent;
            color: var(--white);
        }

        .footer__social:hover {
            background: var(--yellow);
            color: var(--black);
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .footer__top {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 480px) {
            .footer__top {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
        }

        /* ============================================
           ANIMATIONS
           ============================================ */
        @keyframes shake {
            0%, 100% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
            25% { transform: rotate(-1deg); }
            75% { transform: rotate(1deg); }
        }

        .animate-shake:hover {
            animation: shake 0.3s ease-in-out;
        }

        /* ============================================
           SCROLL ANIMATIONS
           ============================================ */
        .reveal {
            opacity: 0;
            transform: translateY(30px);
            transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease;
        }

        .reveal.visible {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: translateY(0);
        }
    </style>
</head>

    <!-- ============================================
         MARQUEE

    <div class="marquee">
        <div class="marquee__track">
            <span class="marquee__item">Web Development <span class="sep"></span></span>
            <span class="marquee__item">UI/UX Design <span class="sep"></span></span>
            <span class="marquee__item">Creative Coding <span class="sep"></span></span>
            <span class="marquee__item">Brand Identity <span class="sep"></span></span>
            <span class="marquee__item">Motion Design <span class="sep"></span></span>
